Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-54905 affecting package rubygem-concurrent-ruby for versions less than 1.3.7-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-54905 affecting package rubygem-concurrent-ruby for versions less than 1.3.7-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.
